name: krakend
explanation: KrakendCheck inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 and only needs `openmetrics_endpoint`. KrakenD's documented OpenTelemetry-Prometheus exporter listens on port 9090 at `/metrics` (per upstream docs and the integration README and tests), with no auth. The remaining options (`go_metrics`, `process_metrics`) are content filters, not endpoint-resolution inputs. Discovery only needs to find a TCP/9090 service responding to a `/metrics` GET.
notes: Port 9090 is the value documented in the KrakenD README and used in tests; the user is free to pick any port in their KrakenD config, but 9090 is the canonical default for the OpenTelemetry Prometheus exporter.
